title: Rubio Hosts Israel and Lebanon for Rare Meeting Shadowed by U.S.-Iran War
summary_full: The gathering ended with encouraging words, even as Israel continued to refuse to halt its military campaign against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon.
